title: Treeline signature and beach landmark phase
summary: Lane 3 should give Treeline a stronger signature threshold place and Beach one more authored landmark or lee-space beat so the five-biome chain carries memorable destinations end to end.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the treeline signature destination handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Treeline should stand out by feel as much as Forest and Tundra do.
The threshold chapter deserves one stronger remembered place.
The new beat should deepen identity without making traversal harsher.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the beach landmark or lee-space handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Beach is a good onboarding biome and can carry one more unforgettable place.

execution_order.goal: Implement the beach landmark or lee-space beat.
execution_order.why_now: A stronger beach landmark helps the whole world feel more place-based.

execution_order.goal: Review the beach landmark or lee-space beat.
execution_order.why_now: The onboarding biome should stay readable and calm.

guardrails: Do not create punishing traversal or maze structure.
Keep routes cozy, recoverable, and visually legible.
Make new destinations distinct from existing forest, scrub, and tundra signatures.
